string 2:
They've been at odds for some time now, so they won't let
each other's messengers get through.
If you insist on going, though, I won't stop you...

But, at the very least, I'd say you should speak to Lord
Apollomon first. It at least still has ears to listen...

Quarrels are such a nuisance... As a result, the residents
have to evacuate.

As the rulers of an area, one would think the two of them
would be a little more mindful of their station.
Anyway... getting to see them isn't gonna be easy.
They're both mad as can be... just like little kids having a spat.

Lady Dianamon has locked down her area completely, so
let's go see Lord Apollomon first!

Lord Apollomon'll probably have some advice on how we can
get some face time with Lady Dianamon, anyhow!

Now that our plan is settled, let's ask those two to help us get
to Lord Apollomon!
You again... What is it this time?!

Please calm yourselves, my good Digimon! The thing is...
th-this here is, uh... m-my assistant! Yeah!
What? Your assistant...?
Yeah. I'm doing some work for Lord Apollomon...
...and my assistant here is, uh, assisting!
So you're saying... you intend to go see Lord Apollomon?

That's right! Which means... we'll just follow the usual
procedure, if you don't mind?
Very well. Hey, "assistant," press this switch.

Do you see? There are two sides to this area. By pressing
this switch, you can change which side you can visit.

If you're Pumpkinmon's assistant, we'll make an exception
regarding the switch's use. You may press it as needed.

Thank you kindly! All right, assistant! We're off to see
Lord Apollomon!

H-Hey! Lord Apollomon just stormed off to see Lady
Dianamon in a mighty fury!
What happened?! Explain at once!

No time for that! Right now, all we can do is get to Lady
Dianamon, and fast!

If you're Pumpkinmon's assistant, we'll make an exception
regarding the switch's use.
You may press it as needed.
We don't trust you.

Thus, you may not use the switch without Pumpkinmon
being present.

H-Hey! Lord Apollomon just stormed off to see Lady
Dianamon!
He looked furious! What have you done?!

Could it be...? Might we see their solar and lunar powers
form an eclipse, and cause GraceNovamon to appear...?

But if things go wrong, it could possibly wipe this whole
place out with a Big Bang!
What happened?! Explain at once!
Are you sure about this?! Just what have you done?!

Listen. Don't do anything that will unnecessarily
inflame Lord Apollomon and Lady Dianamon!

The power of a Big Bang would be tremendous.
There would be nothing left here... including all of us.
Lord Apollomon and Lady Dianamon have made peace...?

I-I don't understand what happened... but the dispute
has been resolved, you say?

I had feared a Big Bang would occur as a result of their
clashing hearts, but...

...it looks like there's no need to worry about that anymore.
In fact, their relationship might be stronger than ever...!
Was it you? Did you repair their relationship? But how...?
Nothing we tried ever worked. We may have misjudged you...

Yes. If Lord Apollomon and Lady Dianamon have
established an emotional bond...
...then GraceNovamon might actually appear.
So, is your business here finished?
We need to see Lady Dianamon, too!

Well, I don't really get it, but if you must...
Just don't do anything to make things any worse.
That's... a Heat Seed! What's the meaning of this?!
We need it in order to change things! You've gotta trust me.
Wait! That's a Chill Seed! Why have you brought that here?!

We need it! We'll put it right back where we found it
when we're done, I swear!
Grr! If anything bad happens, it'll be on your head!

First a Heat Seed, and now a Chill Seed, too?
Do you even know what those are?

Those seeds are literally a crystallization of the
Current's power.

If handled incorrectly, an explosion equivalent to a Big Bang 
reaction will occur, blowing this area to smithereens.
So, we gotta be careful, right? Gotcha!
Do you truly understand?
Hey, relax! This is gonna fix everything!

Lord Apollomon's so mad, the whole area's way hotter 
than normal!

But you seem like you'll be able to make it through.
We're counting on you!
You got this, champ!
You used the Chill Seed.
The flames blocking the way have been extinguished.
Flames are blocking the way through.

Time for that Chill Seed ice crystal we just got... C'mon!
Let it do its stuff!
Wow, the Chill Seed sure did the trick... Huh? Why the long face?

It was the right thing to do! Gotta get to Apollomon first
before we can talk to it!

This is all for the sake of peace! Now, look lively! Off to
see Lord Apollomon we go!

That's a Heat Seed, a concentrated mass of heat flowing with
the power of the Current. Its opposite is a Chill Seed.

They're said to contain the power of the sun and moon.
Lord Apollomon and Lady Dianamon are slowly accumulating them.

Legend has it that if the powers of the sun and moon combine to cause
a Big Bang, a mighty galactic Digimon, GraceNovamon, will be born.

Lord Apollomon and Lady Dianamon are thinking to use
them against the Titans... At any rate, we better hurry.
Yowch! Look at that fire! No way we're getting through that...

...I know! If we go to Chill Cosmic, we might be able to
get our hands on a Chill Seed!
It'd snuff this fire right out! Let's go snag one!

A Chill Seed would be able to snuff out this fire! We can
follow this border route to Chill Cosmic!

Time for that Chill Seed we just got...
C'mon! Let it do its stuff!

Wow, the Chill Seed sure did the trick... Huh? Why the
long face?

It was the right thing to do! We gotta actually get to
Lord Apollomon first before we can talk to him!

This is all for the sake of peace!
Now, off to see Lord Apollomon we go!
A Heat Seed's gone missing...?!
You... Was this your doing, Dianamon?!
You dare mock me...?!

Are you really trying to start a war?! What exactly is it
that you want?!
Look at that rain of fire! No way we're getting past that...
The elevator isn't working.
Removing the Heat Seed seems to have shut down the device.

Uh-oh, the elevator is kaput... Doesn't look like we'll get
it working again, either...
The rain of fire stopped! We can press onward now!

A seed-like object is burning within the machine.
There appears to be some kind of switch.

The machine has stopped, but the seed continues
to radiate heat.
Intruders! Stop them! Don't let the incursion spread any further!
Stand strong! We are the final line of defense!
So it was you... You're the ones who caused this mess!
Whoa, whoa, whoa! Just simmer down! What's going on?!
No more excuses! I'll burn you to cinders right here and now!
It's really blown its top! We gotta get it to cool down!

*panting* That was rough...
But now we can get to Lord Apollomon!
Okay, let's get our heads back in the game and move out!
Th-This isn't good! At this rate... it's gonna be an all-out war!
We gotta go after Lord Apollomon! Hurry!
Agh! W-We're gonna turn into icicles!
Nope, nuh-uh, no way! C'mon, let's get out of here!

Man, it's cold... I feel it in my bones.
But thanks to this Heat Seed, I think we can make it.

Now we can find ourselves a high quality Chill Seed!
Let's start looking!
You used the Heat Seed.

The ice blocking the way has melted. You should be able
to get through now.

This is bad...! Better pick up the pace before things get
even worse!
Yowch... So hot... I think I'm going to melt...
Huh...? I think I see a Chill Seed...

Hey, that one looks good! That's our Seed!
Let's go, assistant!

—Or that's what I would say, if all this ice wasn't
stopping us in our tracks.

...I've got it! Time to think outside of the box!
We'll use the Heat Seed here!

If we get rid of that ice on the gears of the elevator,
I bet it'll start working. Let's give it a shot!

C'mon, get to it!
...Huh? What's wrong?

Don't tell me you're getting cold feet now?!
C'mon! Just do it, already!

Now the way forward is open!
Let's go get that Chill Seed!

Whoa! More ice, and lots of it! I don't think even our
Heat Seed could melt all that!
That being said, since we're not here to see Lady Dianamon...

There's no need to go on any further.
Our priority is getting our hands on a Chill Seed!
We need to focus on getting the Chill Seed!
Another dead end... Time to use the Heat Seed again!
...Why the hesitation? Wait... Did you get cold feet again?!

We'll never get to where we're going at this rate. It's not
like we have any other options, so get to it!

*whistles* Dang, talk about flashy! This Heat Seed is
pretty crazy!
And the Chill Seed... seems fine. All right, let's go grab it!
Hey, looks like we're good!
Now we can reach Lord Apollomon. Let's get moving!

Wow! That wall is smashed to smithereens!
Lord Apollomon is something else!

...But this is no time for being awestruck!
We gotta go after Lord Apollomon!
The gears would turn if the ice were melted.
Ow... What gives...? Ramming into me out of the blue like that...

Apollomon was so angry he scared me senseless...
I wonder what happened...
You, there! You okay? Damn, what was Apollomon's problem?!

Lord Apollomon just knocked everyone down like bowling
pins! And then he melted right through the wall!
Anyway, this is bad! What do we do?! Help!

Whenever you are in need of a ride, Birdramon's
Transportation Service is happy to help.
I don't know the way back...
{end}I'm fine.
You got it, boss. Let's hop to it!
Til next time, then...!
I wanna go to the throne room of the Abyss Sanctuary.

We can't let even an ant get past us now! We're not letting
them have their way. Let's go! This is the moment of truth!
Let's go! This is the moment of truth!
I've got to be strong... but my legs won't stop shaking!

This is for everything we need to protect...!
Don't be scared! Chaaarge!
Don't be scared! Chaaarge!
*pant* *gasp*
You okay?!

You've done more than enough... and we aren't gonna
take it anymore!

You've done more than enough... and we aren't gonna
take it anymore!

Uh-oh, looks like they're confused... Guess we've got
no choice but to knock some sense back into 'em!

If we don't do something, Lord Apollomon and Lady Dianamon
will be in danger!
Sorry, Vikemon, but we're gonna need you to chill out!

Phew, what the heck is going on...?
No time for complaints, though!
Lady Dianamon's throne is just ahead! We gotta hurry!
We have to clean up the mess from our fight.

Once we're finished with that, we will follow. For now,
you go on ahead.
